field_values.action_summary: Dorothy changes into a clean gingham dress and discovers the silver shoes fit perfectly. She sets out on the Yellow Brick Road, passing prosperous Munchkin farms and receiving bows from locals.
field_values.emotional_beat: From domestic preparation to a sense of wonder and curiosity.
field_values.camera_intent: Close-ups: Silver shoes, gingham fabric textures; Wide shots: Colorful Munchkin landscape, long stretch of Yellow Brick Road; Tracking shots: Dorothy walking along the road
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Perfect fit and luster of silver shoes
Absolute cleanliness of the gingham dress
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC001

## Production Intent
Transition Dorothy from a weary traveler into a clean, prepared protagonist. The sequence must visually validate her new status through the tactile details of her gingham dress and silver shoes before moving her into the expansive, colorful Munchkin landscape to establish the scale of her journey.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- Local Munchkins (background/extras)

## Required Environments
- munchkin_country_farms (blue houses, round domes, cornfields)
- yellow_brick_road

## Continuity Constraints
- Silver shoes must fit perfectly and maintain luster.
- Gingham dress must remain clean throughout the sequence.

## Beat List
- BT001: Dressing and shoe discovery.
- BT002: Entering the landscape.
- BT003: The journey begins.
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
